item.title: Tonga Police work with regional partners to hunt high-risk escapees Local authorities are collaborating with Pacific law enforcement agencies to track down two foreign nationals who fled custody.
item.description: Local authorities are collaborating with Pacific law enforcement agencies to track down two foreign nationals who fled custody.

item.title: UN warns Pacific faces growing threat from global scam syndicates From online relationship targeting Tongan women to loans draining Fijian families, a new report reveals criminal groups are expanding into the region.
item.description: From online relationship targeting Tongan women to loans draining Fijian families, a new report reveals criminal groups are expanding into the region.

item.title: Pacific Region
item.description: Leaked correspondence raises questions about Tokelau’s removal from a key tuna scheme while NZ says the island still manages its own fisheries.
item.content:encoded: Leaked correspondence raises questions about Tokelau’s removal from a key tuna scheme while NZ says the island still manages its own fisheries.

item.title: Tongan teen makes history with Kiri Te Kanawa Song Quest win At just 19, Samuel Mataele has become one of Aotearoa’s youngest Song Quest winners - a major milestone for the rising Tongan opera star.
item.description: At just 19, Samuel Mataele has become one of Aotearoa’s youngest Song Quest winners - a major milestone for the rising Tongan opera star.

item.title: Sāmoa and Tonga set up Pacific showdown as Fiji search for answers Manu Sāmoa and Tonga will battle for Pacific bragging rights in the final round of the World Rugby Nations Cup while Fiji head into a must-win test.
item.description: Manu Sāmoa and Tonga will battle for Pacific bragging rights in the final round of the World Rugby Nations Cup while Fiji head into a must-win test.

item.title: Vakatawa’s comeback adds emotion to Flying Fijians’ biggest test yet After a heart condition ended his France career, Virimi Vakatawa is on the verge of a dream test return for Fiji in the Nations Championship.
item.description: After a heart condition ended his France career, Virimi Vakatawa is on the verge of a dream test return for Fiji in the Nations Championship.

item.title: ‘Here for a reason’: Josiah Maama living out his NBA dream From Glen Innes to the San Antonio Spurs, the proud Tongan coach says years of sacrifice have prepared him for basketball’s biggest stage.
item.description: From Glen Innes to the San Antonio Spurs, the proud Tongan coach says years of sacrifice have prepared him for basketball’s biggest stage.
